flag_s

Flag struct for hs_io interfaces. See hs_io::Handshake State Queries

init

high on 1st valid transfer of a handshake

good

high on confirmed transfers

busy

high for entire active handshake

live

high for entire handshake including the initial req probing

body

high on main transfers besides init

exit

high on final pausable cycle

term

high on final pausable cycle with invalid data. flag.body/flag.good are LOW in this case.

tail

high for h/s block after tx

done

high on h/s cooldown cycle
